name: Autonomyx Feature Gap Analyzer
description: Automated feature gap analysis between two or more enterprise software products. Input: product names, category, optional analyst doc or URL. Output: structured JSON with scored feature matrix, gap table, and narrative report. Uses Qwen3-30B reasoning + web research. Single API call for programmatic use. For interactive analysis with PDF uploads, use feature-gap-analyzer skill in Claude.

category.placeholder: e.g. CRM, HCM, BI, ITSM, Marketing Automation — auto-detected if empty

focus_dimensions.placeholder: e.g. AI/ML, API, Security — analyses all 10 if empty

analyst_context.placeholder: Paste text from Gartner, G2, Forrester, or any analyst source

node.description: Product names and optional context for feature gap analysis

model_name.info: Qwen3-30B-A3B with thinking mode — best local reasoning for analysis tasks

max_tokens.info: Feature matrices can be large — 8k for comprehensive analysis

node.description: Local reasoning model for feature gap analysis
Structured JSON: scored matrix, feature table, gaps, recommendation

important_notes: This flow uses Qwen3-30B local knowledge — no live web search
For web-search-augmented analysis with PDF uploads, use feature-gap-analyzer skill in Claude
Paste analyst report text into analyst_context for higher accuracy
Feature existence confirmed from model's training data — always verify critical findings against official docs
Data quality score in output indicates confidence level

api_example.curl:
curl -X POST https://flows.openautonomyx.com/api/v1/run/{flow_id} \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer lf-your-api-key' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"product_a": "Salesforce", "product_b": "HubSpot", "category": "CRM", "focus_dimensions": "AI/ML, API, Pricing"}'
